summary: Completed testing for Iteration 37 - Push Notifications API and Currency Formatting. Backend tests: 21/21 passed. All push notification endpoints working correctly. Code review verified StoreContext currency functions (formatPrice, getCurrencySymbol, getCurrencyConfig) and mobile app services (pushNotifications.js, offlineService.js).
critical_code_review_comments: StoreContext.jsx: formatPrice, getCurrencySymbol, getCurrencyConfig functions properly implemented with store-specific currency configs (INR for India stores, PKR for Pakistan store)
CompetitorDashboard.jsx: Uses useStore() hook to get formatPrice, getCurrencySymbol, getCurrencyConfig - properly integrated with store context
CompetitorPriceCatalog.jsx: Uses useStore() hook for formatPrice, getCurrencySymbol - currency formatting consistent across competitor analysis
push_notifications.py: Well-structured API with device registration, notification sending, templates, and statistics
pushNotifications.js (mobile): Proper Expo push notification integration with permission handling, token registration, and notification channels
offlineService.js (mobile): Comprehensive AsyncStorage caching for products, cart, wishlist, recently viewed with pending action queue for offline sync
seed_data_creation: Test devices registered with TEST_ prefix for push notification testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 tested Push Notifications API and verified currency formatting code. Key findings: All push notification endpoints working (/api/push-notifications/*). StoreContext provides formatPrice, getCurrencySymbol, getCurrencyConfig functions used by CompetitorDashboard and CompetitorPriceCatalog. Mobile app services (pushNotifications.js, offlineService.js) are React Native/Expo code - no runtime testing, code review only.

push_notifications_api.POST /api/push-notifications/send/{custo: PASS - Sends to all customer devices
push_notifications_api.GET /api/push-notifications/devices/{cus: PASS - Returns devices without exposing push_token

currency_formatting_code_review.StoreContext.formatPrice: VERIFIED - Formats price with store-specific currency symbol and locale
currency_formatting_code_review.StoreContext.getCurrencySymbol: VERIFIED - Returns currency symbol (₹ for INR, Rs. for PKR)
currency_formatting_code_review.StoreContext.getCurrencyConfig: VERIFIED - Returns full config {symbol, code, name, locale}
currency_formatting_code_review.CompetitorDashboard currency usage: VERIFIED - Uses formatPrice, getCurrencySymbol, getCurrencyConfig from useStore()
currency_formatting_code_review.CompetitorPriceCatalog currency usage: VERIFIED - Uses formatPrice, getCurrencySymbol from useStore()

mobile_app_code_review.pushNotifications.js: VERIFIED - Expo push notification service with permission handling, token registration, notification channels
mobile_app_code_review.offlineService.js: VERIFIED - AsyncStorage caching for products, cart, wishlist, recently viewed with offline action queue
